name: DPad Flame
tagline: Your Fire TV remote. No nonsense.
desc: Control your Amazon Fire TV from your Android phone over local WiFi. No account, no ads, no subscription. One-tap launch for Netflix, Prime Video, Disney+, Hulu, Max, and YouTube TV.
expandedDesc:
Your Fire TV remote gets lost. Your phone doesn't. DPad Flame turns your Android phone into a full-featured Fire TV remote over your home WiFi — no Bluetooth pairing, no account required, no ads.

Full D-pad navigation, playback controls, volume, and keypad. One-tap launch for Netflix, Prime Video, Disney+, Hulu, Max, and YouTube TV. Saves and names multiple Fire TV devices. Connects automatically on launch when one device is saved.

One-time setup on your Fire TV (enable ADB Debugging in Developer Options), connect once, and you're done. No ongoing configuration, no cloud dependency, no subscription. Just a remote that works.
cta: Beta — coming soon to Amazon Appstore
